meta.name: Mortgage Payment & Affordability Calculator
meta.description: Industrial-grade mortgage calculator compliant with ISO 9001:2015, Lean Six Sigma DMAIC, and WERC financial metrics. Calculates monthly payment, total interest, amortization schedule, and affordability risk.

inputs.label: Loan Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total principal borrowed, typically 80% of property value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total principal borrowed, typically 80% of property value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle mülk değerinin %80'i olan ödünç alınan toplam anapara.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamter geliehener Betrag, typischerweise 80 % des Immobilienwerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Principal total emprunté, généralement 80 % de la valeur du bien.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total del principal prestado, típicamente el 80% del valor de la propiedad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي أصل القرض المقترض، عادة 80% من قيمة العقار.

inputs.label: Down Payment Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of property price paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of property price paid upfront. Affects PMI and LTV ratio.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak fiyatının peşin ödenen yüzdesi. PMI ve LTV oranını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Kaufpreises, der als Anzahlung gezahlt wird. Beeinflusst PMI und LTV-Verhältnis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage du prix de la propriété payé d'avance. Affecte l'APL et le ratio prêt-valeur.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del precio de la propiedad pagado por adelantado. Afecta el PMI y la relación LTV.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة سعر العقار المدفوعة مقدمًا. تؤثر على تأمين الرهن العقاري الخاص ونسبة القرض إلى القيمة.

inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Nominal annual rate, fixed or variable. Used for monthly compounding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal annual rate, fixed or variable. Used for monthly compounding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Nominal yıllık faiz oranı, sabit veya değişken. Aylık bileşik faiz için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nominaler Jahreszins, fest oder variabel. Wird für monatliche Aufzinsung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux nominal annuel, fixe ou variable. Utilisé pour la capitalisation mensuelle.
businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa nominal anual, fija o variable. Se usa para capitalización mensual.
businessContext_i18n.ar: المعدل السنوي الاسمي، ثابت أو متغير. يُستخدم للمركبة الشهرية.

inputs.label: Loan Term (Years)
inputs.businessContext: Duration of the mortgage in years. Standard terms: 15, 20, 30.

businessContext_i18n.en: Duration of the mortgage in years. Standard terms: 15, 20, 30.
businessContext_i18n.de: Laufzeit der Hypothek in Jahren. Übliche Laufzeiten: 15, 20, 30.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Durée du prêt hypothécaire en années. Conditions standard : 15, 20, 30.
businessContext_i18n.es: Duración de la hipoteca en años. Plazos estándar: 15, 20, 30.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مدة الرهن العقاري بالسنوات. المدد القياسية: 15، 20، 30.

inputs.label: Property Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual property tax as percentage of property value. Varies by jurisdiction.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a la propiedad

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual property tax as percentage of property value. Varies by jurisdiction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak değerinin yüzdesi olarak yıllık emlak vergisi. Yargı yetkisine göre değişir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Grundsteuer als Prozentsatz des Immobilienwerts. Variiert je nach Zuständigkeitsbereich.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taxe foncière annuelle en pourcentage de la valeur de la propriété. Varie selon la juridiction.
businessContext_i18n.es: Impuesto anual a la propiedad como porcentaje del valor de la propiedad. Varía según la jurisdicción.
businessContext_i18n.ar: ضريبة العقار السنوية كنسبة مئوية من قيمة العقار. تختلف حسب الولاية القضائية.

inputs.label: Home Insurance Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual homeowner's insurance as percentage of property value.

businessContext_i18n.en: Annual homeowner's insurance as percentage of property value.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Emlak değerinin yüzdesi olarak yıllık ev sahibi sigortası.
businessContext_i18n.de: Jährliche Wohngebäudeversicherung als Prozentsatz des Immobilienwerts.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Assurance habitation annuelle en pourcentage de la valeur de la propriété.
businessContext_i18n.es: Seguro anual de hogar como porcentaje del valor de la propiedad.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التأمين السنوي لمالك المنزل كنسبة مئوية من قيمة العقار.

inputs.label: Monthly HOA Fee
inputs.businessContext: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.

businessContext_i18n.en: Monthly homeowners association fees, if applicable.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa aylık ev sahipleri derneği ücretleri.
businessContext_i18n.de: Monatliche Gebühren der Hausbesitzervereinigung, falls zutreffend.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais mensuels de l'association des propriétaires, le cas échéant.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cuotas mensuales de la asociación de propietarios, si aplica.
businessContext_i18n.ar: رسوم جمعية مالكي المنازل الشهرية، إن وجدت.

inputs.label: Annual Gross Income
inputs.businessContext: Total annual household income before taxes. Used for DTI calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total annual household income before taxes. Used for DTI calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi öncesi toplam yıllık hane geliri. DTI hesaplaması için kullanılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtes jährliches Haushaltseinkommen vor Steuern. Wird für die DTI-Berechnung verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Revenu annuel total du ménage avant impôts. Utilisé pour le calcul du ratio d'endettement.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ingreso anual total del hogar antes de impuestos. Se usa para el cálculo de DTI.
businessContext_i18n.ar: إجمالي دخل الأسرة السنوي قبل الضرائب. يُستخدم لحساب نسبة الدين إلى الدخل.

rules.message: Down payment below 20% triggers PMI (Private Mortgage Insurance).
Debt-to-Income ratio exceeds 43% threshold. Loan may be high risk.
Loan-to-Value ratio exceeds 97%. Maximum allowed for FHA.

thresholds.message: Housing payment exceeds 28% of gross monthly income. Consider reducing loan amount.
Total interest paid over life of loan exceeds 50% of principal. Consider shorter term or lower rate.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
